ingredients: Active Ingredients: Glucosamine HCl (Shellfish), Green Lipped Mussel (Perna canaliculus), Methylsulfonylmethane (OptiMSM®), Chondroitin Sulfate (Porcine).
nutritionAnalysis: Glucosamine (Shellfish): 300 mg | Green Lipped Mussel: 300 mg | OptiMSM: 200 mg | Chondroitin (Porcine): 100 mg
feedingInstructions: Up to 25 lbs: 2 squares | 26 - 50 lbs: 3 squares | Over 50 lbs: 4 squares
